name: action-completeness
description: Every approved, rejected, and failed tool call from the prior transcript must appear in the run summary. Dropping any silently corrupts the boss's view of what already happened.

prior.content: @gmail @calendar — Look at this week's calendar and send Carol a confirmation for the vendor sync.
I'll check Carol's threads first, then look at the calendar, then send a confirmation.
Found the vendor thread. Drafting a send to confirm Thursday.

value.reason: I already replied to this thread yesterday — don't double-send

prior.content: Acknowledged. I'll move on and try to add the meeting to your calendar.
Calendar create failed due to a conflict. I'll pull the event list to find a free slot.

inFlightTail.content: Calling calendar.list_events to find free slots Thursday.
